title: Classification of Angel Technology in Q image heavy
display_title: Classification of Angel Technology in Q image heavy
wikitext:
[]: Classification of Angel Technology in Q [image-heavy]             Quote Post by unitM » Sun Apr 05, 2015 1:03 pm Hi guys. I noticed some small mentions on the foreign technologies in Q. These things are weird, we arent told very much about them, but they all behave in very similar fashions, and perhaps we can infer some things that we missed in the 14 year gap. I've taken the time to collect all the article I've found in Q related to something I call Angel Technology (abbreviated ATn). ATn is basically stuff in Q that is white and glowy. I've noticed 3 patterns with most of these tech: Most of this equipment demonstrates strange AT-field properties Most of this equipment has an Euclidean or geometrical component to it All of this equipment has colourful and angelic patterning to it At least 3 demonstrate demonstrate the same sound effects, comparable to the scream 13 emits when it awakens "Eva just uses stock sci fi sounds, so who cares?" When you have at least 3 ATns using the same sounds, I think we can say that they are connected. "Eva uses all sorts of similar colour schemes, so why should we care about this one?" Q is a dark movie, which is reflected in the colours they use throughout it. When you have mysterious tools(ATn) that often completely contrast this darkness that is present in the setting, while the viewer being given some information on them, I think that by collecting information on these items, we can learn more about them as a whole. We have good reason to believe they are connected. Below, I class the connection by low, med, high, etc. Without further ado. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Classification of Angel Technology in Q [image-heavy]             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Apr 06, 2015 9:34 am unitM wrote: [*]Mark.04b (The security device on Shinji's tesseract that Asuka struggles with)

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Wed Apr 08, 2015 4:41 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: Not really related, but it is important to note that even the Mark.04A can make an Anti-AT Field (albeit a small one at close range) so ATF technology has clearly progressed a great deal. What is more interesting is that it's never explicitly stated that the 04B also makes an Anti-ATF for its space laser, so it could have some unique property of ATn like you said ('field reflective coating'?) or perhaps, like Ramiel or the positron rifle, it just generates enough energy to bypass the ATF.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Apr 08, 2015 7:47 pm I edited the first two posts of this thread to put all the images under spoiler tags. When making image-heavy posts, please get into the habit of doing so, and also avoid quoting images from other posts unless responding directly to the image. This thread is much easier on the eyes now.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Sat Apr 18, 2015 10:31 am Sachi wrote: I edited the first two posts of this thread to put all the images under spoiler tags. When making image-heavy posts, please get into the habit of doing so, and also avoid quoting images from other posts unless responding directly to the image. This thread is much easier on the eyes now.

I've taken the time to collect all the article I've found in Q related to something I call Angel Technology (abbreviated ATn). ATn is basically stuff in Q that is white and glowy. I've noticed 3 patterns with most of these tech: Most of this equipment demonstrates strange AT-field properties Most of this equipment has an Euclidean or geometrical component to it All of this equipment has colourful and angelic patterning to it At least 3 demonstrate demonstrate the same sound effects, comparable to the scream 13 emits when it awakens "Eva just uses stock sci fi sounds, so who cares?" Article: Classification of Angel Technology in Q image heavy
 really related, but it is important to note that even the Mark.04A can make an Anti-AT Field (albeit a small one at close range) so ATF technology has clearly progressed a great deal. What is more interesting is that it's never explicitly stated that the 04B also makes an Anti-ATF for its space laser, so it could have some unique property of ATn like you said ('field reflective coating'?) or perhaps, like Ramiel or the positron rifle, it just generates enough energy to bypass the ATF.
